Die Universität Passau gehört zu den besten 25 Prozent aller Universitäten weltweit. Menschen aus der ganzen Welt begegnen sich auf dem mehrfach ausgezeichneten Campus in der barocken Altstadt Passaus regelmäßig und tauschen sich über ihre akademischen, kulturellen oder unternehmerischen Projekte aus. Die Anmeldung funktioniert ganz einfach mit Ihrer regulären ZIM -Kennung. Rund 11.000 Studierende aus 100 Nationen und über 1.300 Beschäftigte lernen und arbeiten nahe der Altstadt auf einem Campus, der modernste technische Infrastruktur mit einer preisgekrönten The University of Passau has recently launched its careersUP careers portal as a digital interface between employers and students. Registration and use are free of charge. CareersUP replaces the previous Stellenanzeiger and Stellenbörse jobs boards. We hope you will find the new careers portal useful. CareersUP is intended for students and alumni of the University, but also for companies The careersUP career portal of the University of Passau is the ideal interface between employers and students. Logging in to this system is very simple: just use your ZIM username and password. CareersUP is a digital interface that puts employers and students in touch with each other. Logging in to this system is very simple: just use your ZIM username and password. At any time, somewhere between 12,000 to 13,000 job ads are published on the system, so why not make use of this excellent resource when hunting for an internship, part-time job or career-entry position? Please find all job vacancies at the Chair of Marketing and Innovation, as well as internship and job offers of businesses and other universities, below at the Center for Careeres and Competencies.
